name: Cres Garurumon

signature_move.name: Kijū Engetsutou
signature_move.description: Slashes the opponent with itsKijū Engetsutou.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A final form of Garurumon , it is a subspecies of Metal Garurumon which has become humanoid, unlike Z'd Garurumon , a fellow final form. It is clad in armor made of Gold Digizoid , which deflects attacks, and specializes in swordplay wielding the " Kijū Engetsutou " as its weapon. It unleashes its " Jūrou Daikaiten ", where it spins its entire body and attacks the opponent while turning into a blade, as well as " Geki: Hyougetsuga ", in which it molds the Kijū Engetsutou into countless forms using ice, and then hurls it at the opponent, as its techniques.
